title: Dispatch Operations Dashboard
meeting_summary: A regional logistics company needs a dispatch dashboard to assign drivers, track deliveries in real time, and generate daily performance reports. The system must integrate with their existing fleet API and support dispatcher and manager roles.

breakdown.task: Requirements workshops and architecture decision record
UI/UX wireframes and component library setup
REST API: orders, routes, driver status endpoints
WebSocket layer for real-time position updates
Fleet API adapter and data mapping layer
RBAC middleware and audit log persistence
Reporting service: aggregation queries, CSV export
Docker Compose + CI pipeline + staging deploy

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Dispatch Operations Dashboard (Developer View — v2)

### Phase 1 — Discovery & Design (weeks 1–2)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Requirements workshops and ADR | Tech Lead | 18 | 1,125 |
| UI/UX wireframes and component library | Designer | 32 | 2,000 |

**Phase subtotal: 50h / 3,125 EUR**

### Phase 2 — Development (weeks 3–8)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| REST API: orders, routes, driver status | Backend Dev | 40 | 2,500 |
| WebSocket layer for real-time updates | Backend Dev | 28 | 1,750 |
| Fleet API adapter and data mapping | Backend Dev | 30 | 1,875 |
| RBAC middleware and audit logs | Backend Dev | 16 | 1,000 |
| Reporting service: aggregation + CSV | Full-Stack | 20 | 1,250 |

**Phase subtotal: 134h / 8,375 EUR**

### Phase 3 — QA (weeks 9–10)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Backend integration tests (pytest) | QA / Dev | 20 | 1,250 |
| Frontend E2E tests (Playwright) | QA | 16 | 1,000 |

**Phase subtotal: 36h / 2,250 EUR**

### Phase 4 — DevOps & Deploy (week 10)

| Task | Role | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------|------:|-----------:|
| Docker Compose + CI + staging | DevOps | 12 | 750 |
| Performance profiling + query optimisation | Backend Dev | 8 | 500 |

**Phase subtotal: 20h / 1,250 EUR**

### Totals

- **Total hours:** 240
- **Total cost:** 15,000 EUR
- **Team:** 2 Full-Stack Devs, 1 Designer (PT), 1 QA (PT)
- **Duration:** 10 weeks

### Technical Risks
- Fleet API may have undocumented rate limits or inconsistent schema — could add 15–20h if a custom adapter is needed.
- WebSocket connection management under high concurrent load requires dedicated load testing; risk of +20h if concurrency targets are high.

### Assumptions
- Fleet API exposes a stable REST or GraphQL interface with documented auth.
- Client provides test credentials for the Fleet API by week 2.
- Concurrency target is ≤200 simultaneous dispatchers.

### Confidence Level

**Medium** — Core requirements are well defined. Risk remains around the Fleet API contract and WebSocket performance targets, which have not been validated.
